documents.title: Parks and Recreation Commission - Quarterly Review
documents.summary: Discussion on fiscal year budget allocation for trail maintenance. Roll-call vote recorded for 4 out of 5 commissioners. Staff recommendation approved for $150,000 grant disbursement.

documents.title: Statewide Greenway Improvement Fund Request
documents.summary: Application submitted for Section 4A. Project includes resurfacing of Oak Trail. Contractor identified as GreenPath Construction LLC. Total bid amount: $85,000.

documents.title: Parcel Conveyance Agreement - North Side Expansion
documents.summary: Acquisition of Parcel ID 8892-N from private vendor. Price: $120,000. Title transfer processed under Municipal Code Chapter 12.

documents.title: Coordination Between Public Works and Parks
documents.summary: Schedule alignment for utility work near Community Center. Traffic control plan approved by City Engineer.

documents.title: Parks and Recreation Commission - Facility Programming
documents.summary: Review of summer sports league scheduling. Approval granted for 12 youth baseball fields. Staff recommendation noted regarding field lighting upgrades.

documents.title: Temporary Event Permit - Riverfront Festival
documents.summary: Application for weekend event. Capacity limit set at 2,500 attendees. Security vendor contract attached. Fee: $1,200.

documents.title: Vendor Payment Record - Playground Equipment
documents.summary: Payment processed to PlayTime Solutions Inc. for installation of swing sets. Invoice #4492. Amount: $45,000.

documents.title: Site Impact Statement - Wetland Buffer Zone
documents.summary: Assessment of proposed boardwalk construction. No adverse impact on local water table. Approval pending final signage.

documents.title: Parks and Recreation Commission - Capital Improvements
documents.summary: Discussion on maintenance schedule for Central Park. Vote tally: 5-0. Staff recommendation approved for asphalt resurfacing.

documents.title: Landscape Maintenance Services Contract
documents.summary: Agreement with CityScapes LLC. Term: 12 months. Scope includes mowing, pruning, and irrigation repair. Value: $60,000.

documents.title: Resident Feedback - Extended Park Hours
documents.summary: Submission from District 4 resident requesting extended lighting hours. Committee review scheduled for October. Total submissions: 47.

documents.title: Q3 Expenditure Summary
documents.summary: Total spent on recreation programs: $210,000. Under budget by 5%. Contingency fund allocation adjusted.

documents.title: Parks and Recreation Commission - Winter Operations
documents.summary: Planning for snow removal and ice resurfacing. Staff recommendation approved for equipment lease. Vote count: 4-1.

documents.title: Construction Permit - Ice Rink Renovation
documents.summary: Application for mechanical system upgrade. Architectural summary included. Estimated completion: February 2024. Cost: $180,000.

documents.title: Parcel Conveyance Agreement - Dog Park Expansion
documents.summary: Acquisition of adjacent Parcel ID 9901-S from County Trust. Price: $55,000. Title transfer processed under Municipal Code Chapter 12.

documents.title: Safety Protocol Update - Park Access Points
documents.summary: New signage installation at north entrance. Coordination with Police Department for lighting inspection.

documents.title: Parks and Recreation Commission - Grant Review
documents.summary: Review of Federal Recreation Grant eligibility. Staff recommendation approved for application submission. Vote count: 5-0.

documents.title: Donation Log - Community Fundraiser
documents.summary: Record of private donations received for playground repair. Total: $12,500. Donor anonymity requested on 3 entries.

documents.title: Site Impact Statement - Tree Preservation
documents.summary: Assessment of proposed trail widening. 15 mature trees to be preserved. Mitigation plan attached. Approval granted.

documents.title: Consulting Services - Master Plan Update
documents.summary: Agreement with UrbanDesign Partners. Scope includes long-term growth projections. Term: 6 months. Value: $40,000.

documents.title: Parks and Recreation Commission - Summer Programs
documents.summary: Approval of youth summer camp schedule. Staff recommendation approved for 10 new activities. Vote count: 4-0.

documents.title: Special Event Permit - Charity 5K Run
documents.summary: Application for park closure during event. Route map attached. Cleanup deposit: $2,000. Fee: $500.

documents.title: Parcel Conveyance Agreement - Parking Lot Expansion
documents.summary: Acquisition of Parcel ID 7710-E from private developer. Price: $95,000. Title transfer processed under Municipal Code Chapter 12.

documents.title: Q2 Expenditure Summary
documents.summary: Total spent on capital projects: $320,000. Over budget by 2% due to material costs. Contingency fund utilized.

documents.title: Parks and Recreation Commission - Infrastructure Audit
documents.summary: Review of facility safety inspections. Staff recommendation approved for immediate repairs to 3 structures. Vote count: 5-0.

documents.title: Maintenance Services Contract - Irrigation System
documents.summary: Agreement with WaterWise Solutions. Scope includes sensor installation and leak detection. Value: $25,000.

documents.title: Resident Feedback - Noise Ordinance
documents.summary: Submission from resident regarding evening basketball noise. Committee review scheduled for September. Total submissions: 12.

documents.title: Coordination Between Parks and Transportation
documents.summary: Schedule alignment for bike lane construction near park entrance. Traffic control plan approved by City Engineer.
